import itertools


def find_matching_pairs(users, products):
    results = []
    for user in users:
        for product in products:
            if user.region == product.region and user.age >= product.min_age:
                results.append((user, product))
    return results


def cross_join_filter(orders, inventory):
    inventory_by_sku = {item.sku: item for item in inventory}
    matched = []
    for order in orders:
        item = inventory_by_sku.get(order.sku)
        if item and order.quantity <= item.stock:
            matched.append((order, item))
    return matched


def generate_combinations(items_a, items_b):
    items_b_by_type = {}
    for b in items_b:
        items_b_by_type.setdefault(b.type, []).append(b)
    valid = []
    for a in items_a:
        for b in items_b_by_type.get(a.type, []):
            valid.append((a, b))
    return valid
